heading: Sales of ration supplies to messes
label: 2774 Sales of ration supplies to messes
text: Ration supplies may be purchased by the cabin, wardroom, warrant officers’, and other authorized messes and payment therefor made in cash to the commissary officer. The prices to be charged for such supplies shall not be less than the invoice prices, and the cash received from such sales shall be accounted for on the ration return and may be expended for the general mess.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 14, U.S.C., 1946 ed., § 132 (, ). 81st Congress, House Report No. 557.Aug. 1, 1914, ch. 223, § 138 Stat. 620
